name: Kimchi (Korean Cabbage Relish)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Crushed dried hot red chile
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Chinese cabbage into half-inch strips.
2. Mix the cabbage with salt and water until well combined. Let it soak for 5 to 10 hours.
3. Drain the cabbage thoroughly.
4. Combine the drained cabbage with chopped green onions, minced garlic, crushed dried hot red chile, and chopped gingerroot.
5. Mix everything well in a large jar.
6. Cover the jar tightly and refrigerate for at least 1 to 2 days before using.
7. The kimchi will keep well in the refrigerator for several weeks.
8. Use it as relish or salad.
